outlook_paragraph: CRGY shows moderate drilling activity with 12 active sites at decision date, including one newly activated pad and 11 continuously active, resulting in a relative activity delta of +0.5. This suggests stable operational execution heading into year-end 2023. With a segment fraction of 20%, the company has partial exposure to current WTI strength near $80/boe, though realized prices are discounted at 87% of benchmark. The deterministic revenue forecast is $595.2M, reflecting modest volume growth anchored to consensus estimates and limited by fractional asset exposure.
